description: Harness SDD for VS Code Plugin development. This manifest drives the agentic workflow for the vscode-plugin project.

subagents.name: harness-vscode
subagents.description: Orchestrator for the VS Code plugin development. Manages feature_list.json and routes tasks between specialized agents.

subagents.name: spec-author-vscode
subagents.description: Responsible for defining EARS requirements and design specs for the VS Code plugin. Focuses on VS Code API interactions and user experience.

subagents.name: typescript-implementer
subagents.description: Writes TypeScript code for the VS Code plugin. Implements the design specs while adhering to VS Code extension guidelines.

subagents.name: reviewer-vscode
subagents.description: Validates that the implementation matches the specs and passes all automated checks. Ensures R<n> traceability in tests.

commands.name: init
commands.description: Set up Harness SDD for this project (agent-driven scaffold lifecycle)

commands.name: status
commands.description: Show project state (active feature, specs pending, last progress entries)

commands.name: spec
commands.description: Create spec (requirements/design/tasks) for a pending feature

commands.name: approve
commands.description: Approve a spec_ready feature and flip it to in_progress

commands.name: implement
commands.description: Run the implementer on the current in_progress feature

commands.name: done
commands.description: Run the reviewer, verify traceability, mark feature as done
